{{Infobox character
| name = Avernus Incarnation
| aliases = Incarnation of Avernus
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Avernus Incarnation
| abilities = see pieces of the future
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

''See also: [[Avernus Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] of [[Avernus]], also known as [[Avernus]], is a powerful being associated with the rarely traveled [[Territory]] of [[Avernus]]. Physically, she possesses two sets of mismatched wings and bronze feathers that function as hair, which are often tied back. Her hands feature talons instead of fingernails, and she has demonstrated predatory behaviors, such as eating a dead rat. Historically, she was perceived as a person driven to madness who used her abilities to manipulate the minds of citizens in [[Damasca]]. As an [[Incarnation]], she is part of a group that includes figures like [[Valinhall]] and Ragnarus. The process of becoming an [[Incarnation]] is described as a volatile transformation; during the initial stages, the individual is overwhelmed by an intense compulsion to act according to their [[Territory]], making them extremely dangerous and irrational. [[Avernus]] herself suggests that her own [[Incarnation]] occurred during a conflict between Ragnarus and [[Elysia]], possibly due to external manipulation. She maintains a significant presence within her namesake [[Territory]], claiming she can locate anyone who enters it.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|While all others vanished from beneath the Hanging [[Trees]], the [[Avernus]] [[Incarnation]] remained as the sole presence. This entity possesses a human woman's face characterized by raptor eyes and four mismatched, colored wings. In place of fingernails, the creature has talons and maintains the ability to engage in intelligible conversation. Beyond its physical form, the [[Incarnation]] holds the power to perceive fragments of the future, offering advice that has been compared to that of [[Queen]] [[Cynara]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] was the only one not missing from under the Hanging [[Trees]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] of [[Avernus]] has a face like a human woman with bird-of-prey eyes and four colored wings.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] has talons instead of fingernails.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] can see pieces of the future.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] has wings and raptor eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] has mismatched wings.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus Incarnation]] is capable of carrying on intelligible conversations.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] compares [[Queen]] [[Cynara]]'s advice to the [[Avernus Incarnation]]'s advice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
